name: Q22686
description: American businessman and politician (born 1946), President of the United States (2017–2021; since 2025)
abstract: Donald John Trump (born June 14, 1946) is an American politician, media personality, and businessman who is the 47th president of the United States. A member of the Republican Party, he served as the 45th president from 2017 to 2021.

concerts.label: The New York Pops Sixth Birthday Gala Celebration

works.t: New York, New York: New York, New York

concerts.label: A Tribute to Horowitz: Lola Astanova, Piano
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Sherrie Maricle
about_quotes.evidence: I am not a Trump supporter in any way... I don't understand what their motives are for some of this behavior, or supporting a president who is clearly a sociopathic narcissist
about_quotes.doc_title: Sherrie Maricle interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 4, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Bergonzi
about_quotes.evidence: Donald Trump and the Republicans, or the Demo — anybody whose corrupt, criminal. I’m not saying it’s just Republicans, even Democrats. Whoever. It’s cleaning house.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Bergonzi interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 7, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Ran Blake
about_quotes.evidence: my musical composition ideas of Donald Trump were, I think he orchestrated it, like he felt he was the Tchaikovsky captain of the east coast.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ran Blake interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 16, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: A.B. Spellman
about_quotes.evidence: I think Donald Trump introduced such an attitude of authoritarianism...
about_quotes.doc_title: A.B. Spellman interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 19, 2022
